steps.title: Spot the defining claim about the coating
steps.content: The passage states: “The new coating is suitable for common applications, unlike other approaches that require special conditions.” This single claim tells us the coating is practical and broadly applicable.

steps.title: Connect the coating's reach to its effects
steps.content: The passage links friction to both energy consumption and wear. Since the coating reduces friction to nearly nonexistent levels, it can reduce both problems in vehicle transmissions and other common mechanical systems—exactly what choice C states. The other choices either deny the coating reduces wear, misrepresent its practicality needs, or exclude certain systems. That matches choice C — C is correct.
